violations.text: Food contact surfaces of the slicer were observed with an accumulation of food and debris. The food contact surfaces of equipment must be clean to sight and touch. Slicer was cleaned and sanitized during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025
Potato Salad was observed held over 7 days. Food was voluntarily disposed of. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2025
The non-food contact surfaces of the ice machine have an accumulation of dust, dirt, food residue, and other debris. New Violation. Correct By: 11/19/2025

The following were observed in poor repair: -walk-in cooler floors -opening located by basement stairs -wall in dry storage room The physical facilities must be maintained in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 11/05/2026

Ice used for beverages was observed in direct contact with soda lines. PIC informed to cease practice. Ice was voluntarily disposed of during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/26/2025

Allergen advisory statement was not present on menus. A written notice on menus must be available to consumers to inform them of their responsibility to notify staff of any food allergies. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025

Shellfish tags must be maintained for 90 days in chronological order and the date when the last shellfish was used from the bag must be noted on the shellfish tag. PIC informed. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025

Raw hamburger patties were observed stored above ready-to-eat foods such as stuffing in the reach-in refrigerator. Raw animal foods must be separated from raw ready-to-eat food such as vegetables during storage. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025

The chlorine sanitizer concentration for the sanitizing cycle of the dishwasher in kitchen was 0 parts per million (ppm). Chlorine sanitizing solutions must be between 50-100 ppm. Service called during time of inspection. Establishment to sanitize all dishes in 3 bay sink until dishmachine is properly adjusted. Corrected On-Site. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025
The consumer advisory provided does not disclose the foods on the menu that are raw or undercooked. PIC informed. Repeat Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025
Working containers used for storing chemicals taken from bulk supplies were not marked with the common name of the chemical. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025

1. Mussels and scallops were observed thawing on the counter. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) foods must be thawed in one of the following manners: under refrigeration (41 degrees Fahrenheit or less); completely submerged under running water; as part of the cooking process; or in the microwave if cooked immediately after thawing. 2. Vacuumed packaged salmon was observed thawing in reach-in cooler with packaging still intact. Fish was observed at 36 degrees Fahrenheit. Fish was removed from packaging during time of inspection. Vacuum packaged seafood must be removed from packaging prior to thawing. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025

Ice used for beverages was observed in direct contact with soda lines and cold plate. PIC informed to cease practice. Ice was voluntarily disposed of during time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 02/13/2025
The fanguards in the walk-in cooler was observed with an accumulation of dust. The physical facilities shall be cleaned as often as necessary to keep them clean. New Violation. Correct By: 02/27/2025
